Entries.Name: Quebec Kweebec
Entries.Line: Because I care about him. He probably puts on this happy persona for you, like he does to everyone else, but it's hard to actually make him feel that way. So, I like to take every opportunity to do so.

Line.Text: Maybe I would've shared your opinion if we weren't bound together. Maybe he really is an ungrateful little pile of compost from the outside.
